'''Eri Palle''' was a personal [[Aide/Legends|aide]] to [[Nil Spaar]]. Palle assisted the [[Viceroy/Legends|Viceroy]] in a wide variety of methods, from managing Spaar's daily tasks to plotting the [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] of his political enemies. Eri was present when Spaar killed [[Kiv Truun]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]''
